title: December Daily Day 1
excerpt: The plan is to finish each day in the evening after Jack goes down. Keeping it simple and printing photos on my Canon SELPHY CP900 Wireless Printer is how I am going to approach this. I will also ask for…
body: The plan is to finish each day in the evening after Jack goes down. Keeping it simple and printing photos on my Canon SELPHY CP900 Wireless Printer is how I am going to approach this. I will also ask for help from family to contribute to the journaling cards, so you'll see some different handwriting in here on random days. I'll probably only share the pages sporadically, but the main thing I want to try and do is document the random little bits. I used some photos taken before December in the intro page and the first spread. Not going to stress at all about fudging and not having photos from the exact day. Since I am also participating in Big Picture Classes December Duos (starts December 12th), there will be some prompts thrown in. Oh there's nothing like feeling caught up with a project like this from Day 1. Let's see how long it lasts.
